context.audience: Frontend developers who prefer Vue's approachable API, enterprise teams with large Vue 3 codebases, developers in European and Asian markets where Vue has strong adoption
pain_points: Vue 2 to Vue 3 Composition API migration for large codebases
Choosing between Options API and Composition API for team consistency
TypeScript integration and type safety in Vue single-file components
State management with Pinia after Vuex deprecation
Testing Vue components and composables effectively
